title: Kore homepage + PR-driven project timeline
description:
## Summary

- **Kore homepage live at `web.korczewski.de`** — replaces the shared mentolder layout with a distinct Kore design-system page (KoreSubNav, KoreHero with live cluster ticker, KorePillars ×4, KoreTimeline, KoreBugs, KoreTeam, KoreContact, KoreFooter). Mentolder homepage unchanged.
- **PR-driven project timeline** — every merged PR triggers a GitHub Action that writes `tracking/pending/<pr>.json`; a 5-min CronJob drains it into `bachelorprojekt.features` (449 historical PRs backfilled). Live paginated feed via `/api/timeline`.
- **Schema** — `bachelorprojekt.features` + `v_timeline` view (tracking-DB); `bugs.bug_tickets.fixed_in_pr` + `fixed_at` (website-DB). Applied to live cluster.

## Key decisions

- `index.astro` branches on `process.env.BRAND_ID ?? process.env.BRAND` — zero impact on mentolder build.
- `/api/cluster/status` returns live node/pod/brand counts (25 s cache) with a static fallback; live wiring to dashboard is a Phase 5 follow-up.
- `TRACKING_DB_URL` added to both SealedSecrets (mentolder + korczewski) so the CronJob connects to shared-db from within the cluster.

## Test Plan

- [x] 7/7 unit tests (`node --test scripts/track-pr.test.mjs`) pass
- [x] `tsc --noEmit` clean (no new errors)
- [x] `BRAND_ID=korczewski` build succeeds; `BRAND_ID=mentolder` build succeeds
- [x] `https://web.korczewski.de/` → 200, title "Kore. — Self-hosted, vor Ihren Augen."
- [x] `https://web.mentolder.de/` → 200, 0 `.w-hero` occurrences (mentolder untouched)
- [x] `bachelorprojekt.v_timeline` returns 449 rows on live cluster
- [ ] Playwright spec: `KORCZEWSKI_URL=https://web.korczewski.de/ npx playwright test tests/e2e/specs/korczewski-home.spec.ts`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
